case_title: DEIRDRE RONEY VS. BALJEET KAUR PUREWAL

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-13-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-03-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2020 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,575.00 FILED BY RONEY, DEIRDRE AS TO DEFENDANT PUREWAL, BALJEET KAUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED NOV-13-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PUREWAL, BALJEET KAUR
DECLARATION OF DEIDRE RONEY RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF RONEY, DEIRDRE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DEIRDRE RONEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BALJEET KAUR PUREWAL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RONEY, DEIRDRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUREWAL, BALJEET KAUR $2,575.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00, THIS IS A JUDGMENT FOR FAILURE TO PAY RENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
